name: improve
description: Adaptation of shadcn/improve agent skill for AGNT. Audits any codebase and writes prioritized, self-contained implementation plans for other agents to execute. Never edits source code — the plan is the product.
author: shadcn (adapted by jacksonjp0311-gif)

schema.title: Audit Codebase
schema.description: Run a full or focused audit of a codebase directory. Maps the repo structure, conventions, build/test/lint commands, then scans for bugs, security issues, performance problems, test gaps, and tech debt. Returns a prioritized findings table with evidence (file:line references).

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the repository root to audit

focus_paths.description: Optional comma-separated list of specific file or directory paths to scope the audit (e.g. 'src/api/,src/auth/')

schema.title: Write Implementation Plan
schema.description: Given a finding or improvement description, produce a self-contained implementation plan in the shadcn/improve handoff format. The plan includes current state excerpts, exact steps, verification gates, STOP conditions, and out-of-scope boundaries. Written for a zero-context executor agent.

finding.description: The finding or improvement to plan. Include file:line references and why it matters.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the repository root

plan_number.description: Plan number for the NNN-slug.md filename (auto-incremented if omitted)

output_dir.description: Directory to write the plan file (default: <repo>/plans/)

schema.title: Reconcile Plan Backlog
schema.description: Scan the plans/ directory and reconcile the backlog: verify which plans landed (git log), refresh plans whose target files drifted, unblock plans whose dependencies are now done, and retire stale ones. Produces an updated plans/README.md index.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the repository root

schema.title: Review / Critique Plan
schema.description: Read an existing plan file and critique it against the shadcn/improve handoff plan template. Checks for self-contained context, verification gates, hard boundaries, STOP conditions, and drift. Returns a structured review with pass/fail per dimension.

plan_path.description: Absolute path to the .md plan file to review

schema.title: Audit Branch Changes
schema.description: Audit only what the current git branch changes compared to its base branch. Useful before a PR — finds issues introduced by the branch, checks plan alignment, and flags scope creep.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the repository root
